data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Experts Kim Vink and Glenna Achatz Explain What Homebuyers Get Wrong About Mortgage Pre-Approvals
data.description: In a recent news piece dated April 28, 2026, from Great Bend, Kansas, it was highlighted that there are common misunderstandings regarding mortgage pre-approvals. This article delves into the intricacies of what a mortgage pre-approval actually signifies for homebuyers. As financial situations flux, these changes could significantly affect the approval of loans prior to closing. The report aims to clarify these misconceptions and shed light on the critical impact that financial alterations can have on loan approval processes.

data.title: Lincoln Investment Appoints Anthony Bueti as Chief Operating Officer to Scale Enterprise Operations for Wealth Management Firm
data.description: Anthony Bueti has been appointed as part of a strategic restructuring of leadership to improve the advisor experience and operational efficiency at a wealth management firm with $60 billion in assets. The appointment took place in Fort Washington, Pennsylvania, on April 28, 2026. The firm in focus is Lincoln Investment Planning, LLC (Lincoln Investment).

data.title: Tombot’s Robotic Companion Jennie Makes Film Debut in “Walkies,” A Story of Healing & Connection
data.description: In Santa Clarita, California, Tombot's robotic companion known as Jennie will be featured in the film "Walkies," showcasing a heartwarming tale of healing and connection. This innovative technology aims to bring comfort and companionship to individuals in need.

data.title: Election of the Supervisory Board, Management Board and Audit Committee of AB Pieno žvaigždės
data.description: At the Ordinary Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of AB Pieno Žvaigždės on April 28, 2026, the Supervisory Board members were elected for a new four-year term. The board includes Rolandas Petkus and Stanislav Kozel as independent members and Rokas Kvaraciejus as an employee of the company.

data.title: Tetragon Financial Group Limited Announcement of Dividend
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in London, Tetragon's Board of Directors announced a dividend of U.S. $0.12 per share for the first quarter of 2026. The ex-dividend date is April 30, 2026, and the record date is May 4, 2026.

data.title: AEP Declares Quarterly Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 28, 2026, the Board of Directors of American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) announced a quarterly cash dividend of 95 cents per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of May 8 will receive the dividend on June 10, 2026.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Slides On OpenAI Report; Healthcare Name Breaks Out (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index showed some fluctuations while the Nasdaq experienced a significant decline following the release of the OpenAI report. Cadence Design witnessed a sharp plunge in its stock value. This volatility was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, as the Nasdaq showed a notable slide due to the impact of the OpenAI report, while a healthcare company saw a breakout amidst the market turmoil.

data.title: U.S. SENATOR BLUMENTHAL AND CONGRESSMAN TONKO VOW TO ADVANCE SAFE BET ACT TO PROTECT CONSUMERS FROM PREDATORY SPORTS GAMBLING PRACTICES
data.description: Last Friday in Boston, Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-CT) and Congressman Paul Tonko (D-NY) participated in an all-day conference discussing the public health impacts of online sports gambling. They promised to push forward minimum federal standards to address predatory practices in the industry.

data.title: Ex-dividend date and procedure for the payment of Pieno Žvaigždės AB dividends for the year 2025
data.description: During the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held on April 28, 2026, Pieno Žvaigždės AB decided to distribute the Company's profit from the year 2025. It was resolved that a dividend of EUR 0.14 per share would be paid out to the shareholders.

data.title: UFP Industries Expands Pallet Manufacturing Network Through Acquisition
data.description: On April 28, 2026, UFP Industries (NASDAQ: UFPI) revealed the purchase of Berry Pallets, Inc., a pallet manufacturer situated in Waseca, Minnesota. This acquisition includes the operating assets and real estate of Berry Pallets, Inc., and amounts to about $20 million. This move marks a significant expansion in UFP Industries' operations.

data.title: Small Molecule API Market to Reach USD 202.53 Billion by 2036, Driven by Generic Drug Demand and Expanding Oncology Pipeline
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, it has been reported on April 28, 2026, that the global small molecule Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) market is currently experiencing a period of steady growth. Future Market Insights analysis has indicated a positive trend, with key factors such as growing demand for generic drugs and a rise in oncology pipeline activity driving this expansion. The market is expected to continue its upward trajectory propelled by these factors.

data.title: HOK and ROSSETTI Join Forces to Create Expanded Global Sports, Recreation and Entertainment Design Practice
data.description: In New York, HOK has recently acquired ROSSETTI, an architecture firm based in Detroit known for its expertise in sports venue design and renovation projects. This merger enhances HOK's standing as a top global design practice for sports, recreation, and entertainment venues. The combined entity will be known as HOK + ROSSETTI during the integration phase. ROSSETTI's team, led by Matt Rossetti, FAIA, LEED AP, will remain in Detroit, allowing HOK to establish a physical presence in a market it has been keen on.

data.title: Canaan and Tether team up on cooling systems: Canaan secures a big Tether order for mining hardware.
data.description: Canaan has recently sealed a fresh deal with Tether for purchasing modular mining hardware. This collaboration comes as Tether, the stablecoin issuer, ventures into the realm of integrated, data center-like Bitcoin infrastructure. The specifics of the order size or monetary value have not been disclosed publicly.
